title: KwaNojoli drug dealer gets 15-year sentence
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - A man convicted of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - A man convicted of dealing in drugs, Rudolph Geswindt (47), was sentenced to 15 years imprisonment in the KwaNojoli District Court on 14 July.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - A man convicted of dealing in drugs, Rudolph Geswindt (47), was sentenced to 15 years imprisonment in the KwaNojoli District Court on 14 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Warrant Officer Majola Nkohli, media representative for the office of the provincial commissioner of the Eastern Cape, the court suspended five years of the sentence for five years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Geswindt will effectively serve 10 years of direct imprisonment.","html":"Geswindt will effectively serve 10 years of direct imprisonment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was also declared unfit to possess a firearm.","html":"He was also declared unfit to possess a firearm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Geswindt has nine previous convictions, including drug-related offences and drunk driving.","html":"Geswindt has nine previous convictions, including drug-related offences and drunk driving."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Acting on a tip-off on 28 February 2023, Visible Policing members intercepted the accused's vehicle in the KwaNojoli CBD and pulled it off the road.","html":"Acting on a tip-off on 28 February 2023, Visible Policing members intercepted the accused's vehicle in the KwaNojoli CBD and pulled it off the road."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upon searching the vehicle, police found 20g of methamphetamine (tik) valued at around R5 000 stashed in the fuel filler area of the vehicle.","html":"Upon searching the vehicle, police found 20g of methamphetamine (tik) valued at around R5 000 stashed in the fuel filler area of the vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The trial was concluded in just over 28 months.","html":"The trial was concluded in just over 28 months."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The acting Sarah Baartman District Commissioner, Brigadier Asogran Naidoo, welcomed the sentence, saying that it will be a deterrent to those who are involved in trafficking and dealing in illicit drugs and thanked the police members for their sterling work.","html":"The acting Sarah Baartman District Commissioner, Brigadier Asogran Naidoo, welcomed the sentence, saying that it will be a deterrent to those who are involved in trafficking and dealing in illicit drugs and thanked the police members for their sterling work."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
